## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bugfix
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] CI / Tooling

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm run build`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`

Paste key output or CI link:

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused and does not include unrelated changes
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavior changes
- [ ] Docs updated if command surface or workflow changed
- [ ] Changeset added for user-facing release notes (if needed)
